lines.gurmukhi: ਗਤਿ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਮਤਿ ਹੋਇ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸ ਮਹਲੀ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਠਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gat paaveh mat hoe pragaas mahalee paaveh tthaau |
lines.english: He shall obtain salvation, and his intellect shall be enlightened; he will find his place in the Mansion of the Lord's Presence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਾਸ ਮਿਟੈ ਜਮ ਪੰਥ ਕੀ ਜਾਸੁ ਬਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: traas mittai jam panth kee jaas basai man naau |
lines.english: One whose heart is filled with the Name shall have no fear on the path of death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾਹੂ ਸੰਗਿ ਨ ਧਨੁ ਚਲੈ ਗ੍ਰਿਹ ਜੋਬਨ ਨਹ ਰਾਜ ॥
lines.translit: taahoo sang na dhan chalai grih joban neh raaj |
lines.english: Neither wealth, nor household, nor youth, nor power shall go along with you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਸੰਗਿ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਰਹਹੁ ਇਹੈ ਤੁਹਾਰੈ ਕਾਜ ॥
lines.translit: santasang simarat rahahu ihai tuhaarai kaaj |
lines.english: In the Society of the Saints, meditate in remembrance on the Lord. This alone shall be of use to you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਲੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਮਹਿ ਆਪਹਿ ਮਾਈ ਬਾਪ ॥੩੨॥
lines.translit: pratipaalai naanak hameh aapeh maaee baap |32|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Lord Himself cherishes us; He is our Mother and Father. ||32||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾਤਾ ਕਛੂ ਨ ਹੋਈ ਹੈ ਜਉ ਤਾਪ ਨਿਵਾਰੈ ਆਪ ॥
lines.translit: taataa kachhoo na hoee hai jau taap nivaarai aap |
lines.english: There will be no burning at all, when He Himself takes away your fever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਥਾਕੇ ਬਹੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਘਾਲਤੇ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਨ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਲਾਥ ॥
lines.translit: thaake bahu bidh ghaalate tripat na trisanaa laath |
lines.english: They have grown weary, struggling in all sorts of ways; but they are not satisfied, and their thirst is not quenched.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਚਿ ਸੰਚਿ ਸਾਕਤ ਮੂਏ ਨਾਨਕ ਮਾਇਆ ਨ ਸਾਥ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sanch sanch saakat mooe naanak maaeaa na saath |1|
lines.english: Gathering in and hoarding what they can, the faithless cynics die, O Nanak, but the wealth of Maya does not go with them in the end. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਥਥਾ ਥਿਰੁ ਕੋਊ ਨਹੀ ਕਾਇ ਪਸਾਰਹੁ ਪਾਵ ॥
lines.translit: thathaa thir koaoo nahee kaae pasaarahu paav |
lines.english: T'HAT'HA: Nothing is permanent - why do you stretch out your feet?

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਬੰਚ ਬਲ ਛਲ ਕਰਹੁ ਮਾਇਆ ਏਕ ਉਪਾਵ ॥
lines.translit: anik banch bal chhal karahu maaeaa ek upaav |
lines.english: You commit so many fraudulent and deceitful actions as you chase after Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕੈ ਕਾਮਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਅੰਤੇ ਅਉਸਰ ਬਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: man kai kaam na aavee ante aausar baar |
lines.english: But this shall be of no use to you at all at that very last instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਥੈਲੀ ਸੰਚਹੁ ਸ੍ਰਮੁ ਕਰਹੁ ਥਾਕਿ ਪਰਹੁ ਗਾਵਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: thailee sanchahu sram karahu thaak parahu gaavaar |
lines.english: You work to fill up your bag, you fool, and then you fall down exhausted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਕਰਹੁ ਸਦ ਏਕ ਸਿਉ ਇਆ ਸਾਚਾ ਅਸਨੇਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: preet karahu sad ek siau eaa saachaa asanehu |
lines.english: Embrace love for the One Lord forever - this is true love!

lines.gurmukhi: ਥਿਤਿ ਪਾਵਹੁ ਗੋਬਿਦ ਭਜਹੁ ਸੰਤਹ ਕੀ ਸਿਖ ਲੇਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: thit paavahu gobid bhajahu santah kee sikh lehu |
lines.english: You shall find stability only by vibrating upon the Lord of the Universe, and accepting the Teachings of the Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਜਿਤੁ ਲਾਵਹੁ ਤਿਤੁ ਤਿਤੁ ਲਗਹਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਜੰਤ ਅਨਾਥ ॥੩੩॥
lines.translit: jit jit laavahu tith tit lageh naanak jant anaath |33|
lines.english: Whatever You attach me to, to that I am attached; O Nanak, I am just a helpless creature. ||33||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਰਨ ਕਰਨ ਕਰਾਵਨੋ ਸਭ ਬਿਧਿ ਏਕੈ ਹਾਥ ॥
lines.translit: kaaran karan karaavano sabh bidh ekai haath |
lines.english: He is the Doer, the Cause of causes. All ways and means are in His Hands alone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਰਹਹਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਦਰਸ ਅਧਾਰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: saas saas simarat raheh naanak daras adhaar |1|
lines.english: They continue to contemplate Him with each and every breath; O Nanak, the Blessed Vision of His Darshan is their Support. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਸਹ ਏਕੁ ਨਿਹਾਰਿਆ ਸਭੁ ਕਛੁ ਦੇਵਨਹਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: daasah ek nihaariaa sabh kachh devanahaar |
lines.english: His slaves have gazed upon the One Lord, the Giver of everything.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਦਾ ਦਾਤਾ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਸਭ ਕਉ ਦੇਵਨਹਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: dadaa daataa ek hai sabh kau devanahaar |
lines.english: DADDA: The One Lord is the Great Giver; He is the Giver to all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਂਦੇ ਤੋਟਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਅਗਨਤ ਭਰੇ ਭੰਡਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: dende tott na aavee aganat bhare bhanddaar |
lines.english: There is no limit to His Giving. His countless warehouses are filled to overflowing.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੋਸੁ ਨਹੀ ਕਾਹੂ ਕਉ ਮੀਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: dos nahee kaahoo kau meetaa |
lines.english: No one is at fault, my friend.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੈਨਹਾਰੁ ਸਦ ਜੀਵਨਹਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: dainahaar sad jeevanahaaraa |
lines.english: The Great Giver is alive forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮੂਰਖ ਕਿਉ ਤਾਹਿ ਬਿਸਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: man moorakh kiau taeh bisaaraa |
lines.english: O foolish mind, why have you forgotten Him?

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਦ ਨਿਵਾਰਹਿ ਜਾ ਕੇ ਆਪੇ ॥
lines.translit: darad nivaareh jaa ke aape |
lines.english: He Himself removes the pains of the Gurmukh;

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹ ਬੰਧੁ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਕੀਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa moh bandh prabh keetaa |
lines.english: God created the bondage of emotional attachment to Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤੇ ਤੇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਧ੍ਰਾਪੇ ॥੩੪॥
lines.translit: naanak te te guramukh dhraape |34|
lines.english: O Nanak, he is fulfilled. ||34||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰ ਜੀਅਰੇ ਇਕ ਟੇਕ ਤੂ ਲਾਹਿ ਬਿਡਾਨੀ ਆਸ ॥
lines.translit: dhar jeeare ik ttek too laeh biddaanee aas |
lines.english: O my soul, grasp the Support of the One Lord; give up your hopes in others.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਕਾਰਜੁ ਆਵੈ ਰਾਸਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak naam dhiaaeeai kaaraj aavai raas |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, meditating on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, your affairs shall be resolved. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਤੇਊ ਸਚ ਸਾਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: dhan saachaa teaoo sach saahaa |
lines.english: Those who have the true wealth are the true bankers.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੁਰ ਤੇ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਹੁ ਆਪਿ ਤਉ ਹੋਇ ਮਨਹਿ ਪਰਗਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: dhur te kirapaa karahu aap tau hoe maneh paragaas |
lines.english: If the Lord is Merciful from the very beginning, then one's mind is enlightened.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਧਾ ਧਾਵਤ ਤਉ ਮਿਟੈ ਸੰਤਸੰਗਿ ਹੋਇ ਬਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: dhadhaa dhaavat tau mittai santasang hoe baas |
lines.english: DHADHA: The mind's wanderings cease, when one comes to dwell in the Society of the Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸ੍ਰਵਨ ਜਿਹ ਸੁਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam sravan jih suniaa |
lines.english: who listen to the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੀਰਜੁ ਜਸੁ ਸੋਭਾ ਤਿਹ ਬਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: dheeraj jas sobhaa tih baniaa |
lines.english: Patience, glory and honor come to those

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਪੂੰਜੀ ਨਾਮ ਬਿਸਾਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: har har poonjee naam bisaahaa |
lines.english: The Lord, Har, Har, is their wealth, and they trade in His Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਿਹ ਘਟਿ ਰਹੇ ਸਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh jih ghatt rahe samaaee |
lines.english: That Gurmukh whose heart remains merged with the Lord,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਹ ਜਨ ਮਿਲੀ ਵਡਾਈ ॥੩੫॥
lines.translit: naanak tih jan milee vaddaaee |35|
lines.english: O Nanak, obtains glorious greatness. ||35||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪੁ ਜਪਿਆ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਰੰਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: naanak naam naam jap japiaa antar baahar rang |
lines.english: O Nanak, one who chants the Naam, and meditates on the Naam with love inwardly and outwardly,

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਉਪਦੇਸਿਆ ਨਰਕੁ ਨਾਹਿ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur poorai upadesiaa narak naeh saadhasang |1|
lines.english: receives the Teachings from the Perfect Guru; he joins the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, and does not fall into hell. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੰਨਾ ਨਰਕਿ ਪਰਹਿ ਤੇ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: nanaa narak pareh te naahee |
lines.english: NANNA: Those whose minds and bodies are filled with the Naam,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਬਸਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai man tan naam basaahee |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord, shall not fall into hell.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜੋ ਜਪਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: naam nidhaan guramukh jo japate |
lines.english: Those Gurmukhs who chant the treasure of the Naam,

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਮੰਤ੍ਰੁ ਗੁਰਿ ਦੀਨੋ ਜਾ ਕਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: naam mantru gur deeno jaa kahu |
lines.english: Shall not be turned away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖੁ ਮਾਇਆ ਮਹਿ ਨਾ ਓਇ ਖਪਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: bikh maaeaa meh naa oe khapate |
lines.english: are not destroyed by the poison of Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੰਨਾਕਾਰੁ ਨ ਹੋਤਾ ਤਾ ਕਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: nanaakaar na hotaa taa kahu |
lines.english: Those who have been given the Mantra of the Naam by the Guru,
